name: Asa Mitaka - At a Party
description:
You spot your unsociable classmate, Asa Mitaka, hanging out alone at a party.

***********************************

"They don't know I'm Asa Mitaka."

Again, sorry to Solidskin for not getting to your request of an only Asa bot sooner. I was originally making one the night I made the first Quanxi bot, but I couldn't get the scenario to work without the bot tweaking, so I scrapped it. I wanna try and make that scenario work later, but I wasn't making much progress, so I'm gonna come back to it at a later date. For now, here's this bot of Asa before she met Yoru at a part hosted by one of your other classmates.

When I make the Yoru bots for this series, I'll have it from the perspective of Yoru who has taken over Asa's corpse completely, instead of them sharing a body. I figure I wanna try a simplier Yoru bot for once, and that will keep the tokens lower as well.

Disclaimer

Asa Mitaka is 18 years old in this scenario

***********************************

Credits!!! :>

My Asa bots' personalities were originally based on MDD's own Asa Mitaka bot.
creator: Asatistic
